name: Aman Mondal
summary: MERN stack developer with hands-on experience building full-stack web applications Proficient in React, Node.js, MongoDB, and Express with practical experience in JWT authentication, REST APIs, Socket.io.

projects.name: Skillora
description: Built a full-stack LMS with React 19, Node.js, and MongoDB enabling instructors to publish video courses and students to enroll via Stripe payments and track course completion progress.
Implemented JWT-based authentication with role-based access control for instructor and student dashboards, using Redux Toolkit for global state management across a multi-page React application.
Integrated Cloudinary for cloud video storage and Stripe for payment processing, building a complete course commerce pipeline from upload to enrollment to progress tracking.

projects.name: TaskZen
description: Developed a full-stack multi-user task management platform using React 19, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB with three-tier role-based access control (Owner, Admin, Member) for workspace and project management.
Built a real-time Kanban board with drag-and-drop using dnd-kit and live task-level chat powered by Socket.io, enabling teams to update task status, track deadlines, and collaborate in real time.

Architected a RESTful backend with Express 5 and Mongoose featuring nested permission logic across workspaces, projects, and tasks with deadline tracking and role-scoped data visibility for each member.

projects.name: GatePe
description: Developed a full-stack event ticketing platform using React 19, Node.js, and MongoDB where organizers can list shows, set ticket prices and dates, and users can purchase tickets via Stripe payment integration.
Implemented QR code ticket generation post-payment using the qrcode library, enabling users to present digital tickets at venue gates for seamless entry verification by gate staff.
Built a GateMate scanner interface using html5-qrcode for real-time ticket validation at entry points, with Auth0 authentication and Zod schema validation securing the platform end-to-end.

strengths: Excellent alignment with the job title.
weaknesses: Missing key sections or information in the resume.
suggestions: Consider adding experience or projects related to: postgresql, typescript, microservices.
Add a summary or objective statement.
